ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "density_per_km2" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "healthcare_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "p_08" REAL /* Infection rate for the 0-8 age group */,
  "p_09" REAL /* Infection rate for the 9-19 age group */,
  "p_10" REAL /* Infection rate for the 20-29 age group */,
  "p_11" REAL /* Infection rate for the 30-39 age group */,
  "p_12" REAL /* Infection rate for the 40-49 age group */,
  "p_15" REAL /* Infection rate for the 50-59 age group */,
  "p_20" REAL /* Infection rate for the 60+ age group */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Source or provenance of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., government, hospital) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the growth rate belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the growth rate was recorded */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of COVID-19 infections */,
  "growth_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of growth rate (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES infection_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used to generate the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, growth rate) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES infection_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES infection_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being evaluated */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES infection_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, hospital) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_data_types" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "type_id")
)
